result.stdout:
DotNetCsprojPackageSorter

Usage:
  dotnet-csproj-sort <file.csproj> [options]

Options:
  -h, --help      Show help
  --version       Show tool version
  --backup        Create .bak file before modifying
  --dry-run       Show what would change without modifying file
  --check         CI mode. Returns exit code 1 if file is not sorted.

Examples:
  dotnet-csproj-sort MyProject.csproj
  dotnet-csproj-sort MyProject.csproj --backup
  dotnet-csproj-sort MyProject.csproj --dry-run
  dotnet-csproj-sort MyProject.csproj --check
